ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player (e.g., QB, RB, WR) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "hometown" TEXT /* Hometown of the player */,
  "high_school" TEXT /* High school attended by the player */,
  "recruiting_rank" INTEGER /* Recruiting rank of the player */,
  "redshirt_status" TEXT /* Redshirt status of the player (e.g., redshirt freshman, redshirt sophomore) */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "classification" TEXT /* Classification of the player (e.g., freshman, sophomore, junior, senior) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division within the conference */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the team plays */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is located */,
  "head_coach" TEXT /* Name of the head coach */,
  "assistant_coaches" TEXT /* Names of the assistant coaches */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team participating in the game */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team participating in the game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the game was played */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the game (e.g., win, loss, tie) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  "game_time" TEXT /* Time the game was played */,
  "network" TEXT /* Network that broadcast the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "att" INTEGER /* Number of attempts */,
  "yds" INTEGER /* Total yards */,
  "avg" REAL /* Average yards per attempt */,
  "lg" INTEGER /* Longest gain */,
  "td" INTEGER /* Number of touchdowns */,
  "intceptions" INTEGER /* Number of interceptions */,
  "fumbles" INTEGER /* Number of fumbles */,
  "penalties" INTEGER /* Number of penalties */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_game_log" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Number of minutes played */,
  "starts" INTEGER /* Number of starts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_log_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_log_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the coach (e.g., head coach, assistant coach) */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the staff member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the staff member belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the staff member (e.g., athletic trainer, equipment manager) */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary of the staff member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scouts" (
  "scout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scout */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the scout */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the scout belongs to */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of scouting experience */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary of the scout */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scouts_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analyst */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the analyst */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the analyst belongs to */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of analytical experience */,
  "salary" REAL /* Salary of the analyst */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysts_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_stats" (
  "game_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "team1_score" INTEGER /* Score of the first team */,
  "team2_score" INTEGER /* Score of the second team */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  "total_yards" INTEGER /* Total yards gained by both teams */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Number of turnovers */,
  "penalties" INTEGER /* Number of penalties */,
  "time_of_possession" REAL /* Time of possession for both teams */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was received */,
  "award_type" TEXT /* Type of award (e.g., conference, national) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standing */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division within the conference */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "ties" INTEGER /* Number of ties */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Win percentage */,
  "conference_wins" INTEGER /* Number of conference wins */,
  "conference_losses" INTEGER /* Number of conference losses */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_standings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the injury (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the player is expected to return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "note" TEXT /* Note about the game */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of note (e.g., score, injury, ejection) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_notes_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "note" TEXT /* Note about the player */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of note (e.g., injury, suspension, award) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_notes_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "note" TEXT /* Note about the team */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of note (e.g., win streak, loss streak, award) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_notes_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
